channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Se280de, 31st May
item.description:
The park behind Heronsgate School haven't been cleaned and the bushes/grass haven't been cleanes/timemd in a very long time.Our children deserve better.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pettman Crescent, Plumstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown grass verges and weeds on Bowes Road N11 1AT, 31st May
item.description:
The grass verges are overgrown and weeds on pavements.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bowes Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 5 Lime bikes abandoned on Bowes Road N11 1AT, 31st May
item.description:
There are 5 Lime bikes abandoned on the pavement and grass verges. This is blocking street access for all.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bowes Road, New Southgate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging bush next to lamp post, 31st May
item.description:
Blocking footpath Landells Rd 169

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 138, Landells Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside block 65 to 67, 31st May
item.description:
People fly tiping out side our block and over fiiling our bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricketfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog Mess, 31st May
item.description:
Pellatt Road and surrounding streets constantly have dog mess on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Pellatt Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass and more kids play area, 31st May
item.description:
Broken glass unsafe

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Somerford Grove Estate Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public pathway getting blocked by hedges and wheelie bins, 31st May
item.description:
33 and 35 Churchill wood br5 2JD hedge so overgrown is now partly blocking path , wheelie bins never taken in and block path having to walk in the road with a pushchair to get past
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Church Hill Wood, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged car abandoned, 31st May
item.description:
Car has been abandoned since 11/05/26 and collected multiple parking tickets. Someone was in the several days ago but it remains in place

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hopedale Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 56, 31st May
item.description:
Broken shopping trolley

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Mess from communal heating system, 31st May
item.description:
Mess from communal heating system, contractors not cleaned up after the repair (OCO). Will need pressure washer as its black iron oxide

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Comber Grove, Camberwell, Greater London

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Avenue, London

item.description:

item.title: Please can someone clean our st., 31st May

item.title: Huge amount of rubbish around LBB bins, 31st May
item.description:
Place looks an absolute mess - can rubbish be cleared ASAP on Monday.
